channel.title: Blog on Saleh Muhammed
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Saleh Muhammed

item.title: Towards Being More Socially Unacceptable
item.description: If you’ve read that pathetic blog about ‘politics’, you may agree with me that the world - at least in this time period - is not a prefect place at all, actually if you know just a bit about some nation’s history, and their new Z generations, you may realize how unjust and cruel our world is. While the right decision has been clear through the ages, the peoples always insist on choosing whatever satiates their selfish greed and their temporary ephemeral desires, of course, I’m talking about a part of them.
